sub_modules.fp_add_unpack: Combinational IEEE-754 operand unpacker. Extracts signs, effective exponents, significands, applies add/sub sign inversion to operand B, and resolves NaN/INF special cases early.
sub_modules.fp_add_align: Combinational exponent alignment stage. Extends significands with guard/round/sticky bits and right-shifts the smaller operand using jammed sticky-bit logic.
sub_modules.fp_add_core: Combinational aligned significand add/subtract stage. Selects arithmetic operation from effective operand signs, computes raw magnitude, result sign, and exact-zero detection.
sub_modules.fp_add_normalize: Combinational normalization stage. Handles carry-out right normalization, cancellation left normalization, subnormal boundary behavior, and forwards special-case metadata.
sub_modules.fp_add_round_pack: Combinational round and pack stage. Implements IEEE-754 round-to-nearest-even using guard/round/sticky bits, handles overflow to infinity, subnormal promotion, zero packing, and final 32-bit result assembly.
